name: 07-10-dropped-work-backlog-root-cause
title: Reproduce dropped Claude work-backlog install root cause
description: Build an installer regression around the 0.7.0 hoa-manager/rwbp-coordinator failure mode where .claude/commands/sd/work-backlog.md was absent from disk, receipts, and provenance while audits passed. If the gitignored-.claude mechanism reproduces, fix the installer skip path; otherwise document the negative result and keep the 0.8.5 manifest completeness audit as the compensating control.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Root cause confirmed and covered 2026-07-14: the 0.7.0 fleet run used auto-detection without explicit platforms; hoa-manager and rwbp-coordinator lacked active Trellis Claude markers, so all Claude targets were skipped and only old receipt entries were preserved. The focused two-version regression proves the current manifest-completeness audit catches the missing new target through retained receipt inference, while explicit fleet install/audit platform arguments remain the provenance-independent control.
